message:
feat(fuse): implement SEEK_HOLE/SEEK_DATA lseek support

Add SeekWhence enum and lseek method to FsOps trait for sparse file
queries (FUSE 7.24+). Implements SEEK_DATA to find next data region
and SEEK_HOLE to find next hole at or after a given offset.

- Add SeekWhence enum with SEEK_SET/CUR/END/DATA/HOLE variants
- Add lseek method to FsOps trait with default ENOSYS behavior
- Implement ext4_lseek_data/hole using extent tree traversal
- Implement btrfs_lseek_data/hole using extent items
- Wire FUSE lseek handler to dispatch to FsOps::lseek
- Map Format("ENXIO:...") errors to ENXIO for offset >= EOF cases
- Add unit tests for SEEK_DATA/HOLE behavior

Closes bd-ybek

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
